summary: Reusable Tavern UI surfaces for Yggdrasil-hosted YdlTavern. Project-local descriptor; intentionally does not claim final Yggdrasil surface loader semantics.

stylesheets.note: All design tokens are scoped under .ydltavern-surface; the package never assigns to :root.

fonts.note: Fonts are NOT bundled. Hosts should load them at the page/app level. Fallback chains render acceptably without.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Play
surfaces.description: Contract-backed thin slice: live ST context runtime, Turn list projected from mirrored store snapshot, send / generate / edit wired to real proxy, event diagnostics.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Settings
surfaces.description: Settings surface placeholder. Scaffold only — no settings schema, no persistence wiring.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Extensions
surfaces.description: Extensions surface placeholder. Scaffold only — no loader, no registry, no install flow.

fixtures.purpose: demo + test fixture exercising every Turn sub-message kind the renderer handles

notes: This descriptor is project-local and intentionally does not claim final Yggdrasil surface loader semantics.
Surfaces are pure React components — hosts may embed them directly or wire them through a Yggdrasil surface registry once one exists.
YdlTavern owns Tavern UI surfaces, not the desktop/web/app shell. There is no main.tsx, no router, no Tauri config in this package.
ydltavern/play is a contract-backed thin slice: it consumes createSTContext, addOneMessage, Generate, proxy edits, and eventSource dispatch, then projects the resulting Turn list live.
